goals: identify the cause or nature of a condition or issue
represent something visually for clarity or instruction
issue authoritative statements or verbal commands
to represent in digital signals or data
to weaken by adding another substance
to reduce in size, importance, or value
to cause a small dent or damage
to produce a sharp ringing sound

positional: co-located with object or within communication range
present or otherwise accessible to subject
in a public or official venue
at or connected to a distribution venue
contained within private or restricted location
adjacent to object or in contact
in vicinity of or connected to search domain
